economic_notes: Joint venture with Sodexo Canada Inc. and Fox Lake Cree Nation. Investments in Kawechiwasik Development Corporation, Silver Goose Lodge Ltd., and York Factory First Nation Limited Partnership (Keeyask Hydropower). Water treatment plant expansion project underway. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2020 but audit report signed February 11, 2022 — significant delay. Five programs fully consolidated plus three entities (Silver Goose Lodge Ltd., Kawechiwasik Development Corporation, York Factory First Nation Limited Partnership) accounted for by modified equity method. Construction in progress of $8,772,871 (primarily water treatment plant expansion) not included in tangible capital assets net book value. Obligations under capital lease of $233,374 and advance on future profits of joint venture $223,213 also in liabilities. No schedule of remuneration provided. COVID-19 noted as a subsequent event uncertainty.
